001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth;
002
003import java.util.UUID;
004
005public class ServiceUUID {
006    // Tandem TIP service UUID (aka Pump service in this project)
007    public static final UUID TIP_SERVICE_UUID = UUID.fromString("0000fdfb-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb");
008    public static final UUID PUMP_SERVICE_UUID = TIP_SERVICE_UUID;
009
010    // Tandem TDU service UUID (used by Mobi app alongside TIP)
011    public static final UUID TDU_SERVICE_UUID = UUID.fromString("0000fdfa-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb");
012
013    // Bluetooth Device Information service (DIS)
014    public static final UUID DIS_SERVICE_UUID = UUID.fromString("0000180A-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb");
015
016    // Generic Access service
017    public static final UUID GENERIC_ACCESS_SERVICE_UUID = UUID.fromString("00001800-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb");
018
019    // Generic Attribute service
020    public static final UUID GENERIC_ATTRIBUTE_SERVICE_UUID = UUID.fromString("00001801-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb");
021
022    public static String which(UUID uuid) {
023        if (uuid.equals(PUMP_SERVICE_UUID)) {
024            return "PUMP_SERVICE";
025        } else if (uuid.equals(TDU_SERVICE_UUID)) {
026            return "TDU_SERVICE";
027        } else if (uuid.equals(DIS_SERVICE_UUID)) {
028            return "DIS_SERVICE";
029        } else if (uuid.equals(GENERIC_ACCESS_SERVICE_UUID)) {
030            return "GENERIC_ACCESS_SERVICE";
031        } else if (uuid.equals(GENERIC_ATTRIBUTE_SERVICE_UUID)) {
032            return "GENERIC_ATTRIBUTE_SERVICE";
033        } else {
034            return "unknown (" + uuid + ")";
035        }
036    }
037}
